title: spiesia ambigua
intro:
Spiesia ambigua, also known as Speyeria ambigua, is a species of butterfly in the family Nymphalidae, not a plant. However, I can provide you with information about the Spiesia ambigua (a butterfly) as it is often associated with the Spiesia ambigua plant (a medicinal herb), though not the butterfly itself.

I couldn't verify any information about a plant called "Spiesia ambigua".
